Description of dataset

TLS stainings from March (binning 2)
Cycle 1 images - pre-stitched from Lola - were cropped for ROIs with TLSs
Tested segmentation + enhancement methods

Uncorrected

Gaussian blur + unsharped masking

STARDIST

MESMER
